ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner or sales representative who placed the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car associated with the order */,
  "deposit_paid" REAL /* Deposit amount paid by the customer */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the car */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner or sales representative */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner or sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner or sales representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner or sales representative */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner or sales representative */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the owner or sales representative (e.g., sales, manager, admin) */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the sales representative */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date when the sales representative was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the car (e.g., Pontiac, Lamborghini) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the car (e.g., Grand Am, Gallardo) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the car */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the car */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the car */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) of the car */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the car */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the car (e.g., available, sold, reserved) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the car's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_model FOREIGN KEY ("model") REFERENCES car_models ("model"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_make FOREIGN KEY ("make") REFERENCES car_makes ("make")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the car (e.g., Pontiac, Lamborghini) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the car (e.g., Grand Am, Gallardo) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the car model */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., V8, V6) */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., gasoline, diesel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the car model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car make */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the car (e.g., Pontiac, Lamborghini) */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the car make */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the car make was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the car make */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
